subject: urban takeover readiness update for San Francisco | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-1469
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in San Francisco. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Nikola Tesla and Frida Kahlo as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-1469. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: review, delivery.
